$comment: Single source of truth for optional features. The Control Center renders cards from this manifest. Adding a new feature is a one-file edit: append an entry here, ship the corresponding .env line, wire the bot/server handler. UI generation lives in gui/app.html's feature-section renderer.

features.label: Image-to-image
features.summary: Transform attached or replied-to images via SDXL img2img.

features.label: Instruct-Pix2Pix
features.summary: Edit-by-instruction · pulls an extra model on first use.

features.label: Inpaint
features.summary: CLIPSeg builds an auto-mask from the target; SDXL fills it.

features.label: Real-ESRGAN upscale
features.summary: Heavier upscale path · requires the Real-ESRGAN model.

features.label: NSFW gate
features.summary: Hard refusal on NSFW prompts before they reach the image pipeline.

features.label: Force-react picker
features.summary: Manual react via paginated emoji picker.

features.label: Auto-react rules
features.summary: Per-message rule scan — see Auto-react rules tab for the rule editor.

features.label: Daily digest
features.summary: Once-a-day summary of bot activity per server. Channel set via @SeekDeep digest channel here (admin).

target.hint: Set per-server via the @SeekDeep digest channel-here admin command.

features.label: Member join/leave log
features.summary: Posts a Member Joined / Member Left embed to the configured channel. Requires the GuildMembers privileged intent enabled in Discord Developer Portal.

target.hint: Paste the channel ID. Right-click any text channel in Discord (Developer Mode) → Copy Channel ID.
